title: Budget to include salary
doc_html:
§408.  Budget to include salary

The police juries of said parishes shall annually, at the time they prepare their general budget of expenses, budget an amount sufficient to pay the salary fixed in R.S. 16:407.  

Added by Acts 1964, No. 251, §3.
